name: briefing_runtime_constructor
description: HudUiBriefingRuntime::Constructor initializes the briefing background, action queue, progress widgets, panels, locators, ZRD binding path, and first-frame update side effects.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /MD /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?Constructor@HudUiBriefingRuntime@@QAEPAU1@H@Z at 0x403930 still fails: 370 unmasked mismatches, 244 relocation bytes masked, 4 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 736 bytes, VC object symbol size 720 bytes.

Reviewed triage shows function-entry, size, EH cleanup/prologue, and broad constructor call-shape drift. This remains functional-only until the briefing runtime/HUD class cluster receives a binary-safe pass.

The native smoke verifies the real constructor through the first-frame update path with video/sound/time globals isolated. Destructor cleanup is intentionally left to the separate HudUiBriefingRuntime::Destructor tracker.
